steps.bot_message: Hello! I'm ScrappAutoBot. I'm going to ask you a few questions to evaluate your car for scrapping. Say 'yes' to start.
May I have your full name please?
May I have your phone number and your email address please?
Could you provide me your full address, including city, province and postal code please?
Now to make you a good estimation, I need vehicle info. Could you give me the Make, Model, and year of your auto please?
What's the transmission, Type, and driveline please?
Any major missing parts like the Catalytic converter, Engine, Transmission, Battery, or Wheels?
Does it have any body damage?
Does it have alloy Rims or steel Mags?
Was the car in an accident?
Last questions before the valuation, please. Is the car complete?
steps.ack: Ok, great we have everything we need. Now we will evaluate your car and give you an offer. Please hold a moment!

steps.bot_message: We offer you %s. Do you accept?
steps.ack: Perfect! Your pickup will be scheduled shortly.

steps.bot_message: Connecting you to the towing service and finalizing your booking...
